topArticle.title: Oil prices rise as US-Iran peace talks stall

topArticle.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine

topArticle.title: Somalia hunger crisis worsens as drought displaces more than 500,000 people

topArticle.title: Missing 5-year-old girl likely abducted from Outback home, police say
topArticle.description: Police are searching for a man recently released from prison over her disappearance.

topArticle.summary: 警察は、少女の行方不明事件で服役を終えたばかりの男を捜索している。

topArticle.summary: 85歳のディオンヌ・マリー・ハンナは、実の息子を含む2ダース以上の人々を騙した疑いがかけられている。

topArticle.title: Portugal's arms industry is taking off
topArticle.description: Portugal has built up a surprisingly large, independent arms industry over the past five years. But whether it can be truly autonomous with the US as a major ally remains to be seen.
topArticle.titleJa: ポルトガルの兵器産業が離陸
topArticle.summary: ポルトガルは過去5年間で、予想外に大規模で独立した兵器産業を構築。しかし、主要な同盟国である米国との関係の中で真に自律できるかはまだ不明である。

topArticle.title: Germany has world's second biggest gold reserve. Time to cash it in?
topArticle.description: To ease the burden on consumers, DIW head Marcel Fratzscher proposes selling part of Germany's gold reserves — currently worth around €440 billion.

topArticle.summary: ドイツのDIW所長は、消費者の負担軽減のため、ドイツが保有する約4400億ユーロ相当の金準備の一部売却を提案している。

topArticle.title: A rumour, a lynching in India and a long wait for justice

topArticle.titleJa: 噂、インドでのリンチ、そして長い正義を待つ日々

topArticle.title: Mystery deepens over Mojtaba Khamenei's condition after Iran unveils ‘martyr’ mural
topArticle.description: A viral mural showing the Islamic Republic's new ayatollah among dead Iranian leaders has deepened speculation he was killed or gravely wounded in the 28 February strikes on Tehran.
topArticle.titleJa: イランが「殉教者」の壁画を公開後、モジュタバ・ハメネイの容態に関する謎が深まる
topArticle.summary: イランが新しい最高指導者を死亡した指導者たちの中に描いた壁画を公開し、2月28日のテヘラン攻撃で彼が死亡または重傷を負ったとの憶測が深まっている。

topArticle.title: Mali defence minister killed amid flurry of insurgent attacks
topArticle.description:
Car bomb kills Sadio Camara at home during coordinated assaults by rebel groups including West African al-Qaida affiliate
Mali’s defence minister was killed in an attack on his residence, the government said on Sunday, a high-profile fatality during coordinated assaults staged the previous day by insurgents including the West African affiliate of al-Qaida.
A car laden with explosives driven by a suicide attacker drove into Sadio Camara’s residence in the town of Kati, the spokesperson, Issa Ousmane Coulibaly, said in a statement read out on state television. A firefight ensued, and Camara sustained injuries from which he later died in a hospital, Coulibaly said, adding that Mali would observe two days of mourning.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: マリ国防相、反政府勢力の攻撃激化の中死亡
topArticle.summary: マリの国防相が、イスラム過激派による攻撃で自宅で死亡しました。国家は2日間の服喪期間を設ける予定です。

topArticle.title: China car giant BYD says it can thrive without US
topArticle.description: With the price of fuel rising China's BYD says it is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels.
topArticle.titleJa: 中国の自動車大手BYD、米国なしでも成長できると表明
topArticle.summary: 燃料価格の高騰を受け、BYDは化石燃料からの世界的な転換から利益を得る体制を整えていると発表した。

topArticle.title: US millionaire big-game hunter dies after being crushed by elephants
topArticle.description:
Ernie Dosio, a 75-year-old vineyard owner, was hunting an antelope species in Africa when the incident occured

Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox

An American millionaire big-game hunter has died after being crushed by a group of elephants during a hunting expedition in Gabon.
Ernie Dosio, a 75-year-old vineyard owner, was hunting yellow-backed duiker, an antelope species, in the central African country of Gabon when the incident occurred last Friday. While in the Lope-Okanda rainforest, he and his guide unexpectedly came across five female elephants accompanied by a calf.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: 米国の富豪大物狩人、象に押しつぶされ死亡
topArticle.summary: アフリカのガボンでアンテロープを狩猟中だった米国の富豪が、象の群れに襲われ死亡しました。

topArticle.title: Altman apologizes after OpenAI failed to alert police before fatal Canada shooting
topArticle.description:
OpenAI said the company had identified an account using abuse-detection efforts, but determined at the time it didn’t meet threshold for legal referral
The head of OpenAI has written a letter apologizing that his company didn’t alert law enforcement about the online behavior of a person who shot and killed eight people in Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia.
In the letter posted on Friday, Sam Altman expressed his deepest condolences to the entire community.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: OpenAI、カナダでの銃撃事件前に警察に通報せず、アルトマン氏が謝罪
topArticle.summary: OpenAIのサム・アルトマンCEOは、同社がカナダでの銃撃事件の容疑者のオンライン行動を把握していたものの、警察に通報しなかったことについて謝罪しました。

topArticle.title: UK position on Falklands will not change, No 10 says after leaked Pentagon memo
topArticle.description:
Internal email proposes US should reassess support for UK claim to islands because of lack of support for Iran war

UK politics live – latest updates

Downing Street has been forced to insist that Britain will not yield sovereignty over the Falkland Islands, after a leaked Pentagon email proposed the US should reassess its support for the UK’s claim on the islands because of a lack of British support over Iran.
The memo reflected ways in which the Trump administration could punish Britain for failing to follow the US lead in bombing Iran, and comes before a potentially fraught three-day state visit to the US by King Charles.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: 英、フォークランド諸島に関する立場は変わらず＝首相官邸
topArticle.summary: 流出した国防総省の機密文書に対し、英国政府はフォークランド諸島に関する領有権の立場は変わらないと強調しました。

topArticle.title: French prison guards strike over overcrowding as jails near 90,000 inmates

topArticle.title: Historic ship 'Kyrenia II' sets sail once again in Cypriot waters

topArticle.title: Three Kosovo Serbs jailed over deadly gun battle and monastery siege

topArticle.summary: イタリア国立公園で、先週10頭、今週さらに8頭のオオカミの死骸が発見され、毒殺の疑いが浮上。

topArticle.title: Turkey to return to F1 calendar in 2027

topArticle.summary: トルコGPが6年ぶりに2027年のF1カレンダーに復帰することが決定。

topArticle.title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
topArticle.description: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.

topArticle.summary: メキシコが麻薬研究所を破壊する作戦中に発生した衝突で、CIA所属とされる米国人2名が死亡。メキシコは彼らが活動許可を得ていなかったと主張しており、国際的な麻薬対策と主権の問題が浮上している。

topArticle.title: Rights groups critical as Venezuela prisoner release scheme 'coming to an end'

topArticle.title: Why your recycled clothes could end up in this South American desert
topArticle.description: Old garments from around the world are being discarded in the South American country.
topArticle.titleJa: あなたにごみとして出された服は、なぜ南米のこの砂漠にたどり着くのか
topArticle.summary: 世界中から集められた古着が、南米のある国にある砂漠に大量に廃棄されている現状について。リサイクルを意図された衣料品が環境問題を引き起こしている深刻な実態を解説する。

topArticle.title: 'Every drop of water counts': Fear for the future of Argentina's glaciers

topArticle.titleJa: 「一滴の水も重要」アルゼンチンの氷河の未来への懸念
topArticle.summary: アルゼンチンの氷河に対する保護を緩和する物議を醸す法律が可決され、鉱業開発への道が開かれたことで、氷河の未来と水資源に対する深い懸念が広がっている。

topArticle.title: The technological transformation of Colombia's armed conflict

topArticle.summary: コロンビアの武力紛争は、AIだけでなく、戦場、意思決定、社会統制を変革する技術革新で進化しています。

topArticle.title: Community micro-hydropower plants revolutionise isolated areas of the Dominican Republic
topArticle.description: Community micro-hydropower projects in the DR rely on local leadership to deliver energy from renewable sources to isolated areas excluded from national distribution systems, contributing to reduced greenhouse gas emissions.

topArticle.summary: ドミニカ共和国の小水力発電プロジェクトは、地方のリーダーシップにより、国の配電網から除外された地域に再生可能エネルギーを供給しています。

topArticle.title: How Bad Bunny brought the issue of Puerto Rico’s power grid into world view
topArticle.description: Puerto Rico’s electricity system has faced repeated crises since 2017’s Hurricane Maria, which destroyed much of the grid and triggered the longest blackout in modern U.S. history; outages remain routine.

topArticle.title: Ecuador’s Netanyahu and Trump supporters target Ecuadorian–Iranian Cultural Center

topArticle.summary: エクアドルでは、宗教や民族を理由に隣人を敵視する対立が、文化センターを標的とする事態に発展しています。

topArticle.title: Concerns grow as Jamaica ends Cuban medical programme

topArticle.title: How far-right ‘fear tactics’ affect girls seeking legal abortion in Brazil

topArticle.title: Nawat language now has its own Wikipedia

topArticle.title: Beyond words: Incarcerated women’s responses to punitive systems in Peru
topArticle.description: A collage-based artistic creation workshop revealed how a group of incarcerated women counter the dynamics and effects of imprisonment through individual reflection, creative practice, and the sustaining of collective bonds.
topArticle.titleJa: 言葉を超えて：ペルーの懲役刑に服する女性たちの処罰的システムへの対応
topArticle.summary: コラージュベースの芸術創作ワークショップは、投獄された女性たちが、個人の内省、創造的実践、集団的絆の維持を通じて、投獄の力学と影響に対抗する方法を明らかにしました。

topArticle.title: Thousands at risk after multi-million dollar Everest flood warning system left to rust
topArticle.description: The flood warning system at Imja glacial lake has not been maintained since 2016, fearful locals tell BBC.
topArticle.titleJa: エベレストの多百万ドル相当の洪水警報システムが放置され、数千人が危険に
topArticle.summary: イムジャ氷河湖の洪水警報システムは2016年以降維持されておらず、地元住民はBBCに不安を語った。

topArticle.title: Forty-six women-led businesses in Jordan to benefit from WEIDE digital trade programme
topArticle.description: Forty-six women-led businesses in Jordan have been selected as beneficiaries of the Women Exporters in the Digital Economy (WEIDE) Fund, allowing them to begin a year-long programme to strengthen their participation in international trade. The announcement was made in Amman on 23 April at a launch event hosted by the Jordan Enterprise Development Corporation (JEDCO), WEIDE's partner business support organization in the country.
topArticle.titleJa: ヨルダンの女性経営企業46社がWEIDEデジタル貿易プログラムの恩恵を受ける
topArticle.summary: ヨルダンの女性経営企業46社が、WEIDEデジタル経済基金の受益者として選ばれ、国際貿易への参加を強化する1年間のプログラムを開始する。

topArticle.title: DG Okonjo-Iweala welcomes Chief Executive Sam Hou Fai of Macao, China to the WTO
topArticle.description: Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala met with the Chief Executive of Macao, China, Sam Hou Fai on 23 April at the WTO. They discussed the active role Macao, China plays at the WTO and its strong support for the multilateral trading system. As trade openness and transparency are key to Macao, China's strong economic performance, both leaders highlighted the importance of the WTO for supporting the ongoing contribution of Macao, China to the global economy.
topArticle.titleJa: オコンジョ=イウェアラ事務局長、マカオ（中国）のサム・ホウ・ファイ行政長官をWTOに歓迎
topArticle.summary: オコンジョ=イウェアラWTO事務局長がマカオ（中国）のサム・ホウ・ファイ行政長官と会談し、多角的貿易システムへのマカオの積極的な役割と支持について協議した。

topArticle.title: Madagascar launches safeguard investigation on certain tableware, kitchenware, and household and packaging articles
topArticle.description: On 17 April 2026, Madagascar notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards that it had initiated on 15 April 2026 a safeguard investigation on imports of certain tableware, kitchenware, and household and packaging articles, of plastics.
topArticle.titleJa: マダガスカル、特定の食器、台所用品、家庭用品および包装品に対するセーフガード調査を開始
topArticle.summary: マダガスカルは2026年4月15日、特定のプラスチック製食器、台所用品、家庭用品などの輸入に対するセーフガード調査を開始したことをWTOに通知した。

topArticle.title: Viet Nam submits request to join Expansion of the Information Technology Agreement
topArticle.description: Viet Nam has submitted a request to join the 2015 Expansion of the Information Technology Agreement (ITA II), the Chair of the Committee of Participants on the Expansion of Trade in Information Technology Products, Mr Andrei Rusu of Romania, informed members at a meeting on 15 April. Viet Nam, already a member of the 1996 ITA, which eliminates duties on 203 IT products, intends to submit its draft tariff commitments in due course to cover a further 201 products under the ITA II.
topArticle.titleJa: ベトナム、情報技術協定（ITA）拡大への参加を申請
topArticle.summary: ベトナムが2015年版情報技術協定（ITA II）への参加を申請。既存のITAに加え、追加で201品目の関税撤廃を目指す意向を示した。

topArticle.title: Kazakhstan initiates dispute regarding Indonesia duties on imported hot-rolled steel coils
topArticle.description: Kazakhstan has requested WTO dispute consultations with Indonesia regarding additional ad valorem import duties on hot-rolled steel coils originating from Kazakhstan. The request was circulated to WTO members on 15 April. This is the first time that Kazakhstan has brought a case as a complainant to the WTO dispute settlement system.
topArticle.titleJa: カザフスタン、インドネシアの熱延鋼板輸入関税巡り紛争解決協議を開始
topArticle.summary: カザフスタンは、インドネシアによるカザフスタン産熱延鋼板への追加関税について、WTO紛争解決協議を要請。カザフスタンが紛争解決システムに申し立てるのは今回が初。
